name: pull-to-refresh
description: Wraps a scrollable region and triggers a refresh when pulled down past a threshold at the top

meta.name: PullToRefresh
meta.description: Wraps a scrollable region and triggers a refresh when pulled down past a threshold at the top

props.name: onRefresh
props.description: Called when the pull passes the threshold; the spinner shows until it settles

props.name: labels
props.type: { pull?: string; release?: string; refreshing?: string }

whenToUse: A scrollable list or feed on touch devices that the user refreshes by pulling down from the top
Mobile screens where a dedicated refresh button would be redundant or out of reach
Content that updates on demand and benefits from a familiar pull gesture
whenNotToUse: Desktop, pointer-first surfaces — provide an explicit Refresh button
Content that auto-refreshes or paginates on scroll — use infinite scroll instead
Regions that are not the primary scroll container of the screen

antiPatterns.bad: Wrapping a non-scrolling element and relying on pull as the only refresh path
antiPatterns.good: Wrap the scroll container and also expose a Refresh control for non-touch users
antiPatterns.why: Pull-to-refresh is touch-only; keyboard and pointer users need an explicit control

related.name: Spinner
related.reason: Shows the Spinner while the refresh promise settles

related.name: ScrollArea
related.reason: Wraps a scrollable region; pair with the app’s scroll container

intent.a11yRationale: The gesture is a touch-only enhancement: it arms only at scrollTop 0 and uses touch-action/overscroll containment so normal scrolling and keyboard use are unaffected. A polite aria-live status region announces the pull, release, and refreshing states (strings from the i18n catalog), and the Spinner exposes role="status" while loading. Because pull-to-refresh cannot be performed without a pointer, apps should also offer an explicit refresh control for keyboard users.

flexibility.note: Pull distance required to trigger is configurable (default 64px)
May return a promise; the spinner persists until it settles
